jobs.title: Software Engineer (Payment Network) - Global Payment - Indonesia
jobs.description: ResponsibilitiesAbout Global PaymentThe Global Payment team of ByteDance provides payment solutions - including payment acquisitions, disbursements, transaction monitoring, payment method management, foreign exchange conversion, accounting, reconciliations, and so on to ensure that our users have a smooth and secure payment experience on ByteDance platforms including TikTok.The Payment Network PI team is part of the Global Payment Network organization. We focus on supporting binding payment instruments via diverse payment channels and managing the instruments lifecycle. Our mission is to ensure high-quality and reliable payment instruments through robust system design and multi-layered safeguards, enabling users to enjoy a smooth and secure payment experience on ByteDance platforms such as TikTok.Responsibilities1. Build high-quality products to enrich user experience and support business requirements;2. Actively participate in software development life cycle;3. Write robust technical design and architecture;4. Identify, prioritise and execute tasks in the software development life cycle;5. Develop tools and applications by producing clean, efficient code;6. Perform peer review, code debugging, validation, and verification testing;7. Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to improve our products;8. Build monitoring and alerting systems to support online troubleshooting;9. Participate in joint release process to ensure product delivery is as expected without issues;10. Create and update documentation during each of the development phases.QualificationsMinimum Qualification(s)1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, related technical discipline, or equivalent practical experience;2. Software development experience in one or more general purpose programming languages, such as Java/Go/C++/C#/Python;3. Excellent proficiency in backend server development and understanding in relational database;4. Eagerness to learn new things in a fast-paced environment, possess strong analytical thinking, and pay exceptional attention to details.Preferred Qualification(s)1. Minimum 3 years relevant work experience from a large-scale internet business;2. Experience in building distributed systems with high availability and financial security;3. Experience in financial services, domestic or international online payment is preferred;4. Those with international team work experience are preferred.About UsFounded in 2012, ByteDance's mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. With a suite of more than a dozen products, including TikTok, Lemon8, CapCut and Pico as well as platforms specific to the China market, including Toutiao, Douyin, and Xigua, ByteDance has made it easier and more fun for people to connect with, consume, and create content.​Why Join ByteDanceInspiring creativity is at the core of ByteDance's mission. Our innovative products are built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission we work towards every day.​As ByteDancers, we strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our Company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​Diversity & Inclusion​ByteDance is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At ByteDance, our mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

jobs.title: Fullstack Engineer
jobs.description: Fynd is an AI-native unified commerce platform headquartered in Mumbai, India. We help enterprise retailers and large store networks bring together what typically sits in silos—online commerce, in-store operations, and logistics—into one modular, scalable stack. Trusted by 300+ enterprise retailers and supporting 20,000+ stores, Fynd powers end-to-end retail execution: build and run high-performance websites, sell across marketplaces, modernize store experiences, and automate logistics and supply chain workflows. Our platform is designed for speed, accuracy, and scale, enabling teams to launch faster, operate smarter, and deliver consistent customer experiences across every channel.About The RoleThe Fullstack Engineer will be responsible for ensuring smooth day-to-day platform operations and reliable on-site support at the Tirupati plant. This role has a direct impact on business continuity by enabling timely platform changes, resolving local issues quickly, and maintaining strong coordination between plant stakeholders and the engineering team. The position is critical to bridging operational needs in Tirupati with broader technology support from Mumbai.What will you do at Fynd?Provide daily on-site engineering support at the Tirupati plant and ensure continuous physical presence during working hours.Coordinate closely with local stakeholders, plant staff, and cross-functional teams to understand operational needs and priorities.Implement and support platform changes, fixes, and enhancements required for plant operations.Troubleshoot technical issues promptly and escalate complex problems with clear context and ownership.Communicate effectively in the local language to build trust and ensure smooth collaboration with on-site teams.Work with existing team members to improve coordination between Tirupati and Mumbai and reduce operational gaps.Support AI-assisted workflows and engineering tools to improve productivity and execution quality.Document changes, operational learnings, and issue resolutions to create better visibility for stakeholders.Some Specific Requirements2+ years of Experience in full-stack application development and production support.Strong understanding of API integrations, debugging, and issue resolution.Knowledge of databases and ability to perform basic backend/SQL troubleshooting.Exposure to system deployments, change management, and release coordination.Familiarity with AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor).Excellent problem-solving skills with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.Effective stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration skills.Ability to work closely with on-site plant teams and remote technology teams in a dynamic environment.What do we offer?GrowthAt Fynd, growth is limitless. We nurture a culture that encourages innovation, embraces challenges, and supports continuous learning. As we expand into new product lines and global markets, we’re seeking talented individuals eager to grow with us.We believe in empowering our people to take ownership, lead with confidence, and shape their careers.Flex UniversityAccess in-house learning sessions and workshops designed to enhance your professional and personal growth.Learning Wallet: Enrol in external courses or certifications to upskill—we’ll reimburse the costs to support your development.CultureWe believe in building strong teams and lasting connections.Regular community engagement and team-building activitiesBiannual events to celebrate achievements, foster collaboration, and strengthen our workplace cultureWellnessMediclaim policy for you + parents + spouse + kidsExperienced therapist for better mental health, improve productivity & work-life balanceWe work from the office 5 days a week to promote collaboration and teamwork. Join us to make an impact in an engaging, in-person environment!

jobs.title: Java Web Developer
jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled and experienced Java Backend Developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture, with hands-on experience in building scalable and secure backend systems. Familiarity with AWS services and a working knowledge of JavaScript and library like React is a plus.Key Responsibilities• Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Java and Spring Boot• Build and manage RESTful APIs and Microservices• Implement MVC architecture and ensure clean, maintainable code• Work with relational databases• Use Maven for project management and Git for version control• Collaborate with frontend developers and DevOps teams• Deploy and manage services on AWS (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS)• Optimize application performance and scalability• Participate in code reviews, testing, and debuggingRequired Skills• Strong proficiency in Java (8+)• Deep understanding of Spring Boot and Microservices architecture• Experience with REST APIs and MVC frameworks• Experience with unit test frameworks• Solid knowledge of SQL databases and query writing.• Familiarity with Maven, Git, and CI/CD pipelines• Exposure to AWS services (EC2, S3, Lambda, etc.)• Good understanding of software design principles and best practices
